Name: Grade A - Premium
Description: Highest quality produce with perfect appearance, optimal size, and superior taste - suitable for high-end retail and restaurants

Name: Grade B - Standard
Description: Good quality produce with minor cosmetic imperfections but excellent nutritional value - ideal for general retail markets

Name: Grade C - Commercial
Description: Acceptable quality with noticeable cosmetic flaws but good nutritional content - suitable for food service and wholesale

Name: Grade D - Processing
Description: Lower grade produce with significant cosmetic issues but safe for consumption - used for processed foods, juices, and sauces

Name: Grade E - Livestock Feed
Description: Produce not suitable for human consumption due to quality issues - repurposed as animal feed or compost material
